@camera.ui/camera-ui-coral.tagline: Coral Edge TPU (TFLite) detection backend for camera.ui.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-coreml.tagline: Apple CoreML detection backend for camera.ui.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-eufy.tagline: Integrates Eufy security cameras and doorbells into camera.ui, with device discovery, live streaming, and motion, object, battery and doorbell events.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-homekit.tagline: Exposes camera.ui cameras and sensors to Apple HomeKit, bridging motion, doorbell, battery, contact, light, switch, siren, security system and audio events into the Home app.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-nvr.tagline: Manage and store video recordings from your cameras.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-onnx.tagline: ONNX Runtime detection backend for camera.ui.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-opencl.tagline: GPU-accelerated motion detection for camera.ui using OpenCL.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-opencv.tagline: Motion detection for camera.ui using OpenCV.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-openvino.tagline: OpenVINO detection backend for camera.ui, optimized for Intel hardware.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-pamdiff.tagline: Pixel-based motion detection for camera.ui using the pam-diff algorithm on ffmpeg PAM frames.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-ring.tagline: Integrates Ring cameras and doorbells into camera.ui, with device discovery, live streaming, and motion, battery, light, siren and doorbell events.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-rust-motion.tagline: Native motion detection for camera.ui, powered by a Rust detector for low CPU usage.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-smtp.tagline: Motion detection for camera.ui via SMTP.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-tuya.tagline: Integrates Tuya / Smart Life cameras into camera.ui, with device discovery and live streaming.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-wasm-motion.tagline: Motion detection for camera.ui running as a WebAssembly module.

@camera.ui/camera-ui-wyze.tagline: Integrates Wyze cameras into camera.ui, with device discovery, live streaming and motion events.
